name: Dietary supplements category overlay
change_note: Migrated from script CATEGORY_CHECKLIST into a composable category overlay.
checklist_hints: Product classification, ingredient legality, label disclaimer, claim substantiation, and GMP evidence are checked.
Novel ingredient, drug/medical claim, or high-risk health claim signals trigger human escalation.

requirements.requirement: Verify supplement classification, ingredient legality, dosage/form, manufacturing quality evidence, and market entry route for the destination market.
requirements.decision_effect: Unclear classification, restricted ingredients, or missing quality evidence blocks approval until resolved.
requirements.notes: Novel ingredients, high-risk actives, and products resembling drugs require human escalation.

requirements.requirement: Check supplement label disclaimers, nutrition/health claims, disease claims, warnings, and platform claim policies.
requirements.decision_effect: Disease treatment/prevention claims normally trigger rejection or human escalation unless a lawful route is verified.
requirements.notes: Claims review must use official market and platform sources.

gaps: Seed overlay: verify destination-market supplement classification and regulator requirements per case.
